title: Star Wars Technical Journal of the Rebel Forces
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{MagazineIssue |image=[[File:TechJournal3.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Technical Journal
of the Rebel Forces'' |editor=[[David Hutchison]] |cover artist= |contributors=[[Lora Johnson]] |publisher=[[Starlog Communications International]] |release date=*[[October]] [[1994]]{{CargoBay|url=item-detail/133|text=Rebel Forces}} *[[1996]] {{C|Special Edition}}''Star Wars Technical Journal of the Rebel Forces'', Special Edition, pg. 11, notes that the magazine's three Special Edition volumes were published prior to [[September 15]], [[1996]]. |subscribers= |pages=83 |isbn= |issn= |genre= |issue=3 |series=''[[The Official Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Technical Journal of the Rebel Forces''''', also styled as "'''''Star Wars Technical Journal Vol. 3'''''," was the final volume in ''[[The Official Star Wars Technical Journal]]'' magazine series from [[Starlog Communications International]]. It was published in [[October]] [[1994]]. The three issues were later compiled into the compendium title ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal]]''. In [[1996]], to celebrate the upcoming release of ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy Special Edition]]'', Starlog reprinted all three volumes of the ''Technical Journal'' as "Special Edition" versions. Each Special Edition volume came in a sealed poly bag along with bonus content in the form of an eight-page gatefold supplement. A German-language version was also released in 1996 by [[Modern Graphics Distribution]].{{WebCite|url=https://jedi-bibliothek.de/datenbank/ausgabe/technisches-handbuch-der-rebellen-streitkraefte|text=Star Wars Sonderband 3: Technisches Handbuch der
